title: SQLGetInfo returns incorrect value for SQL_FN_NUM_TRUNCATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_numeric (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC(8,3) CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_aggregate (agg_value) SELECT TRUNC(value::NUMERIC, 2) FROM test_numeric;
SELECT TRUNC(agg_value::NUMERIC, 1) AS truncated_agg FROM test_aggregate WHERE agg_value IS NOT NULL;
